news.headline: NCA officer faces charges for alleged Bitcoin theft in 2017; 50 BTC stolen valued at $77,000 then and $4 million now.
news.summary: A National Crime Agency officer allegedly stole 50 BTC, which would have been valued at $77,000 in 2017 and is now worth $4 million.

news.headline: German parties reach agreement with Greens on debt package
FDA approves expansion of ILUVIEN label to treat uveitis; ANI Pharmaceuticals plans to market in US.ி
news.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. disclosed on March 14, 2025, that the FDA has granted approval for an extended label of ILUVIEN (fluocinolone acetonide intravitreal implant) for the treatment of chronic non-infectious uveitis in the posterior segment of the eye. This approval encompasses various updates to the label such as the Warnings and Precautions section. ANI intends to market ILUVIEN for chronic NIU-PS alongside its existing approval for treating diabetic macular edema in the U.S. Outside the U.S., ILUVIEN is authorized for both DME and NIU-PS in seventeen European nations. ANI Pharmaceuticals, Inc. trades on Nasdaq under ANIP.

news.headline: Eton Pharma's ET-600 passes pivotal bioequivalence study; NDA submission slated for April 2025.
news.summary: The recently conducted pivotal bioequivalence study confirmed the success of the company's patented desmopressin oral solution. This milestone paves the way for the submission of a New Drug Application (NDA) anticipated to be filed in April 2025. This significant development signifies a crucial step forward in the company's pharmaceutical innovation, with the potential to offer a novel treatment option in the near future.

news.headline: Hamas: We received a proposal from mediators to restart Gaza ceasefire negotiations and responded to it - Statement
EU urges countries to progress with capital markets reforms, stressing importance. #FinancialNews
Chemours partners with NTT DATA and Hibiya Engineering, Ltd. for Opteon™ 2P50 trial.
news.summary: Chemours, a company based in Wilmington, Del., has announced a collaboration with NTT DATA and Hibiya Engineering, Ltd. The partnership aims to conduct a full-scale trial of the Opteon™ 2P50 product. This joint effort signifies a significant step in promoting sustainable solutions, particularly within the chemical industry. The trial will involve testing the product on a larger scale to evaluate its effectiveness and potential impact. The collaboration seeks to capitalize on the combined expertise of the three companies to drive innovation and ecological advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Innovative Industrial Properties declares 1st quarter 2025 dividend of $1.90 per share, totaling $885 million dividends paid so far.
news.summary: In San Diego, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (IIP), the sole real estate firm listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol IIPR, specializing in the regulated U.S. cannabis sector, shared news of a first quarter 2025 dividend. The board of directors has approved a dividend of $1.90 per common stock share, equating to an annualized rate of $7.60 per common share. Notably, since establishment, IIP has disbursed a total of over $885 million in common stock dividends to investors.

news.headline: Dundee Precious Metals renews normal course issuer bid for common shares, purchased 11,028,569 shares under previous bid.
news.summary: Dundee Precious Metals Inc. (TSX: DPM) has announced its intention to renew its normal course issuer bid (the “New Bid”) on the Toronto Stock Exchange (“TSX”) to purchase certain common shares (“Shares”). The Previous Bid, initiated on March 18, 2024, will end on March 17, 2025. Under the Previous Bid, approval was granted to buy up to 15.5 million Shares, equivalent to approximately 9.8% of the public float by March 6, 2024. From the initiation until February 28, 2025, the Company bought back 11,028,569 Shares under the Previous Bid through TSX and alternative trading platforms at an average price of US$9.57 (Cdn $13.51) per Share.

news.headline: Weekly roundup from PR Newswire includes 13 consumer press releases, featuring Pizza Hut, Barbie™ G-SHOCK, and LG's new TV lineup.
news.summary: This week, noteworthy consumer and retail announcements were made via PR Newswire, featuring Pizza Hut introducing a charcuterie board, a new Barbie™ G-SHOCK partnership, and LG unveiling its latest TV lineup. The news was released on March 14, 2025, highlighting innovations and collaborations in the consumer and retail sectors. Keep tuned for the latest updates in this dynamic industry.

Weekly finance roundup: 12 press releases, including Redfin's sale to Rocket& impact of caregiving on women investors.
news.summary: This week, significant financial updates were highlighted in press releases from PR Newswire. Key announcements included Redfin's acquisition by Rocket and a report on how caregiving duties affect the career progression of female investors. The news was shared on March 14, 2025, in New York. This update covered a wide array of financial insights, with a focus on these notable events. The transaction involving Redfin and Rocket grabbed attention due to its implications for the market. Additionally, the analysis of caregiving responsibilities shedding light on challenges faced by women investors offered valuable insights. The consistent flow of press releases from various sectors underscored the dynamism of the financial landscape.

news.headline: MRC Global reported Full Year 2024 results with $3,011M in sales, $78M net income. Q4 2024 saw $664M in sales, $1M net loss. CEO optimistic about 2025 outlook.
news.summary: The news article reports on MRC Global Inc.'s financial performance for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024. In 2024, the company reported operating cash flows of $268 million, sales of $3.011 billion, net income from operations of $78 million, and adjusted EBITDA of $202 million. The gross profit margin was 20.6% for the full year. In the fourth quarter of 2024, MRC Global reported operating cash flows of $73 million, sales of $664 million, and a net loss from operations of ($1) million. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $32 million with a gross profit margin of 20.3%.The company's CEO expressed optimism for 2025 due to business outlook, gas utilities business rebound, product pricing inflation, U.S. natural gas infrastructure growth, and expansion into new markets. Key financial goals for 2025 include generating $100 million in cash from operations and achieving a target net debt leverage ratio of 1.5x. MRC Global also announced a $125 million share buyback authorization.Additionally, the company's balance sheet showed a cash balance of $63 million, long-term debt of $387 million, and net debt of $324 million as of December 31, 2024. MRC Global's sales for the fourth quarter of 2024 were $664 million, with a segment breakdown for U.S. and international sales provided. The article includes detailed financial statements and metrics like adjusted net income, gross profit margin, operating income, and earnings per share.

news.headline: Top 6 Spring destinations from the Caribbean to Spain.
news.summary: In the latest update, it was reported that the total number of confirmed COVID-19 cases in the country has reached 150,000, with 10,000 new cases recorded in the past week alone. The death toll has also risen to 5,000, with 500 new fatalities reported. Health officials are urging the public to continue following safety guidelines, such as wearing masks and practicing social distancing, to help curb the spread of the virus. Additionally, vaccine distribution efforts are ongoing, with 20% of the population now vaccinated. The government is considering implementing stricter measures in regions experiencing a surge in cases to prevent further spread of the virus.

news.headline: Mineros board permits directors and management to trade shares amidst Sun Valley Tender Offer.
news.summary: Medellin, Colombia--Mining company Mineros S.A. (TSX:MSA, MINEROS:CB) has announced that the board of directors has approved the necessary authorization for directors and management to trade Mineros Shares in accordance with Colombian laws. This authorization, granted in relation to the Amended Sun Valley Offer detailed in a press release on March 4, 2025, allows for the buying and selling of issued and subscribed ordinary shares of Mineros.

news.headline: Affordable AR headset Analog-AR changes game for indie devs, educators, book lovers. Starting at $199. Share stories in new way.
news.summary: Creators in the indie developer, educator, and book enthusiast communities are being encouraged to utilize affordable augmented reality technology to enhance their storytelling. The city of Portland, Oregon, will host a gathering on March 14, 2025, where participants can explore the exciting possibility of bringing stories to life through AR experiences. This innovation aims to revolutionize the way individuals interact with books, turning reading into an immersive journey comparable to a thrilling rollercoaster ride. Attendees will discover how AR can breathe new life into words, creating an engaging and dynamic narrative experience.

news.headline: Collective Mining receives C$63.4 million investment & early warrant exercise from Agnico Eagle Mines Limited.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Collective Mining Ltd. (NYSE: CNL) (TSX: CNL) shared news of a recent agreement with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited. Agnico Eagle has committed to subscribing to a particular agreement with Collective.

news.headline: CVS introduces weight management program for 3.5M members, showing improved health outcomes & cost savings.
news.summary: CVS Health® has announced that 3.5 million members of CVS Caremark's clients can now benefit from a clinical weight loss program that has shown proven results and high satisfaction rates. The program, known as CVS Weight ManagementTM, was introduced in Woonsocket, R.I., on March 14, 2025. CVS Health® presented data highlighting the success of the program, which has garnered positive feedback from participants.

news.headline: New Gold completed its tender offer for 7.50% Senior Notes due 2027, commenced on March 4, 2025. (100)
news.summary: In a press release dated March 14, 2025, New Gold Inc. ("New Gold" or the "Company") (TSX: NGD) (NYSE American: NGD) revealed the initiation of a tender offer, starting on March 4, 2025, to acquire all outstanding shares. The offer is open for all interested shareholders to sell their shares at the specified price. The financial terms of the offer were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Patagonia Gold secures up to $40 million investment for Calcatreu Project development in Rio Negro, led by Black River Mine Inc.
news.summary: Patagonia Gold Corp. announced significant updates on the development of its Calcatreu project in Rio Negro. The company is planning a proposed financing round to raise up to US$40 million. This investment will involve Black River Mine Inc., which will purchase a new class of preferred shares in Patagonia Gold Canada Inc., a subsidiary holding the project through its ownership of Minera Calcatreu SAU. The Investor, led by Carlos J. Miguens, is a consortium of investors forming a newly established corporation.

news.headline: MRC Global Inc. (NYSE: MRC) reports full year and fourth quarter 2024 results in Houston on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, MRC Global Inc. (NYSE: MRC) announced its financial results for the full year and fourth quarter of 2024. The company provided an overview of its performance during this period.

news.headline: Coloplast Finance B.V. had its Annual General Meeting on March 14, 2025. Coloplast A/S approved the 2023/24 annual report. Ernst & Young named auditor.
news.summary: Coloplast Finance B.V. conducted its Annual General Meeting on March 14, 2025. The meeting saw approval of the annual report for the financial year 2023/24 by Coloplast A/S, the sole shareholder. Furthermore, Ernst & Young Accountants LLP was chosen as the auditor for Coloplast Finance B.V.

Hero Esports CEO Danny Tang joins business leaders at CNBC CONVERGE LIVE in Singapore to discuss global esports growth.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Hero Esports, the leading esports organization in Asia, attended the first CNBC CONVERGE LIVE event in Singapore. Danny Tang, the Co-Founder and CEO, served as a guest speaker at the conference. The event took place at a venue in Singapore and aimed to bring together industry professionals to discuss various topics related to esports and its impact. Hero Esports showcased its success and growth in the industry, underscoring its position as a key player in the Asian esports market.

news.summary: The recent reports indicate that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%. This decrease represents a significant improvement compared to the previous month's rate of 5.2%. Additionally, the economy has added approximately 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, showing a robust growth trend. The labor force participation rate has also increased to 63.8%, marking a positive shift in employment dynamics. These numbers reflect a steady recovery and point towards a more stable economic outlook in the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Ubisoft, creator of Assassin’s Creed, reportedly seeks gaming backers.
Taylor Morrison's EVP Darrell Sherman to retire after 16 years. Todd Merrill to succeed as general counsel on June 1, 2025.
news.summary: Todd Merrill will take over as the new VP and General Counsel of Operations at Taylor Morrison Home Corporation on June 1, 2025. The announcement was made by the America's Most Trusted® Home Builder headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, on March 14, 2025. Taylor Morrison is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol TMHC. This change comes as Darrell Sherman, the current EVP and Chief, is stepping down.

news.headline: Key press releases this week: Southwest Airlines introduces new fees for checked bags, Rocket acquires Redfin, Nickelodeon unveils new series.
news.summary: New developments in the business world have been making headlines recently, including Southwest Airlines introducing additional fees for checked bags. Rocket's acquisition of Redfin has also been causing a stir, reshaping the real estate market. On top of that, Nickelodeon has announced the release of a highly anticipated new series. The latest updates come amidst a busy news cycle, emphasizing the need to stay informed in today's rapidly changing landscape.

news.headline: KJTS and Stonepeak form joint venture for district cooling projects; will invest in diversified facilities.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur and New York, KJTS Group Berhad ("KJTS" or the "Group") (KLSE: KJTS), a prominent provider of energy-efficient cooling solutions and integrated energy management services in Malaysia, and Stonepeak, a top alternative investment firm focusing on infrastructure and real assets, revealed a partnership to establish and invest in district cooling facilities. This joint endeavor aims to invest in a range of projects at the outset.

news.headline: Heima Inc. introduces A.D.A.M., the future of home living for busy families and professionals, promising to ease daily tasks.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Brooklyn, New York, it was stated that the fast-paced lifestyle of today brings about several difficulties that current technology fails to effectively tackle. The modern household, especially for busy families and working individuals, is inundated with daily chores and responsibilities, resulting in heightened levels of stress and fatigue. This situation highlights the growing need for innovative solutions to address these challenges faced by individuals and families in managing their homes.

news.headline: Sheriff James Mendrick selects Dr. Robert Renteria as Lt. Governor pick for Illinois. 147 characters
news.summary: In a press release on March 14, 2025, DuPage County Sheriff and Gubernatorial Candidate Sheriff James Mendrick unveiled his selection of Dr. Robert J. Renteria, an entrepreneur, nonviolence advocate, and community activist, as his running mate for Lieutenant Governor. This move signifies Mendrick's plan to secure a diverse support base.

news.headline: Bybit, 2nd largest crypto exchange, offers zero fees on indices trading for MT5 users until April 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on March 14, 2025, Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally by trading volume, revealed a special offer for MT5 users on its platform. This initiative, titled Indices Unleashed, introduces zero-fee trading. Running from today until April 12, 2025, traders on Bybit can benefit from this promotion and execute transactions without incurring any fees.

news.headline: Cango Inc. receives non-binding letter of intent from Enduring Wealth Capital Limited, forms special committee.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Cango Inc. (NYSE: CANG) disclosed that its Board of Directors received a preliminary non-binding Letter of Intent from Enduring Wealth Capital Limited. This development marks a significant step for the company as it navigates potential opportunities. No further details were provided regarding the potential implications or next steps.

news.headline: Tuniu reports unaudited Q4 and fiscal year 2024 results: Revenues up 22.2% to RMB407.5M, net income at RMB83.7M. Dividend of US$0.036 per ADS declared.
news.summary: Tuniu Corporation, a leading online leisure travel company in China, released its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024. In FY 2024, revenues from package tours increased by 22.2% to RMB 407.5 million. Gross profit increased by 21.9% to RMB 358.0 million. Net income in 2024 was RMB 83.7 million compared to a loss in 2023. For Q4 2024, net revenues were RMB 102.7 million, a 2.8% increase from 2023. The company expects an 8% to 13% increase in net revenue for Q1 2025. With cash and cash equivalents of RMB 1.3 billion as of Dec 31, 2024, Tuniu also announced a share repurchase program and declared a cash dividend. Non-GAAP financial measures were provided to understand underlying business performance. Tuniu plans to focus on innovation and quality development in 2025.

news.headline: AirSculpt Technologies announces fiscal 2024 Q4 and full year results. Ended Dec 31, 2024, for premium body contouring procedures.
news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida on March 14, 2025, AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:AIRS) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. AirSculpt Technologies, Inc. is recognized as a leading national firm that offers top-quality body contouring services.

news.headline: Calfrac CEO Pat Powell resigns, effective immediately. Board starting search for replacement. TSX:CFW.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on March 14, 2025, Calfrac Well Services Ltd. revealed that Pat Powell has stepped down as the Chief Executive Officer and director of Calfrac. The company (TSX:CFW) expressed gratitude for Powell's three years of service and stated they will initiate the search for a new permanent CEO.

news.headline: KuCoin releases market trend report and trading bot strategies for March 2025, empowering traders in the crypto market.
news.summary: In Victoria, Seychelles, on March 14, 2025, KuCoin, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange, revealed its new market trend and trading bot strategies report for March 2025. This report aims to equip traders with valuable insights to improve their trading experience and success.

news.summary: The planned sale of ports in Panama by CK Hutchison, a Hong Kong conglomerate, to a group led by BlackRock, the American finance giant, is facing opposition from Beijing.

RLX Technology reveals Q4 and fiscal year 2024 financial results. Based in China, the leading e-vapor company operates globally.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on March 14, 2025, RLX Technology Inc. ("RLX Technology" or the "Company") (NYSE: RLX), a prominent global e-vapor brand, revealed its unaudited financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024. The report provides a comprehensive overview of the Company's performance during this period, offering stakeholders valuable insights into their financial standing and market position.

news.headline: Bitcoin speculators lose over $100M in panic selling within 6 weeks, causing market cap to plummet. Analysts warn of ongoing bearish trend.
news.summary: In the past six weeks, Bitcoin speculators have experienced losses totaling over $100 million due to panic selling, as revealed by onchain analytics platform CryptoQuant. Short-term holders who bought BTC between one to three months ago are particularly affected, with their market capitalization now lower than their realized capitalization, signaling realized losses. This behavior is creating increased selling pressure, possibly leading to further price declines in the short term. The net unrealized profit/loss score for these investors is currently at -0.19, indicating more coins are in negative territory than in the past year. Despite historical patterns of short-lived corrections followed by recoveries, on-chain indicators suggest a potential shift towards a broader bearish phase in the market. Large-volume entities are seeing this as an opportunity to add exposure at around $80,000 levels.

news.headline: German economy expected to stagnate in 2025, down from previously forecasted 0.2% growth - DIW institute
German economy expected to grow by 1.1% in 2026, down from previously forecasted 1.2% - DIW institute
